items.title: Chinese AI has leveled up, and brought renewed focus on the open weight model shift
items.description: It's the latest AI model from China to close the performance gap with leading U.S. AI labs.

items.title: Leather jacket worn by Nvidia CEO goes for just under $1 million at Sotheby's auction
items.description: The high price for the garment is a sign that collectors are looking to bid on artifacts and collectibles from the artificial intelligence boom.

items.title: The White House is dictating access to frontier AI models, shifting power from tech giants, sources say
items.description: The Trump administration is taking steps to control who gets access to the latest frontier models, people familiar with the matter told CNBC.

items.title: Trump rips Canada as wildfire smoke spreads, says U.S. will add pollution cost to tariffs
items.description: The smoke coming from active wildfires in Canada has led to unhealthy air quality in swaths of the U.S., which could affect the World Cup final in New Jersey.

items.title: Taco Bell says it has removed lettuce linked to cyclosporiasis outbreak from its restaurants
items.description: Taco Bell, which the CDC linked to the cyclosporiasis outbreak, will likely recover soon from the health safety scare, according to analysts.

items.title: SpaceX stock has cratered nearly 23% since the company joined the Nasdaq-100
items.description: SpaceX's stock plunged further on Friday, a day after it aborted a test flight for its Starship rocket at the last second.

items.title: Iraq and Syria sign agreement to restore oil pipeline that would provide alternative to Strait of Hormuz
items.description: Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi is visiting the U.S. this week. He met with President Donald Trump at the White House on Tuesday.

items.title: Apple, Nvidia vie for title of world's most valuable company
items.description: Nvidia shares have underperformed in 2026 as Wall Street shifts to companies powering the infrastructure AI buildout.

items.title: Netflix stock falls as earnings forecast disappoints, company says it will give fewer engagement updates
items.description: The streaming giant said it would cut back on the frequency of its "What We Watched" reports, which provide a picture of engagement.

items.title: Anthropic in early talks with Meta to acquire compute power
items.description: The talks come weeks after Anthropic announced a similar deal with Elon Musk's SpaceX to use the computing capacity at its Colossus 1 data center

items.title: Epstein victims blast Trump attorney general nominee Todd Blanche after meeting
items.description: "Todd Blanche treated the meeting as a mere 'check-the-box' exercise intended to secure votes for his confirmation," said Epstein survivor Dani Bensky.

items.title: Economic outlook is worsening and Trump is getting blamed, CNBC survey finds
items.description: The public is as depressed about the economy as it has been since the years just after the pandemic, according to the All-America Economic Survey.

items.title: FAA lets Boeing sign off on 737 Max, 787 airworthiness certificates again
items.description: The move is a vote of confidence in Boeing from the U.S. government.

items.title: Oil tankers face 'worst case scenario' in Hormuz as Iran steps up attacks on ships, maritime risk CEO says
items.description: One seafarer was killed and three were injured in attack on the crude oil tanker Al Bahyah off Oman's coast on Tuesday.

items.title: Iran says civilian infrastructure hit by latest U.S. strikes, expands attacks to Syria, Bahrain
items.description: The escalating standoff comes as the fragile truce signed by the U.S. and Iran last month showed further signs of unravelling

items.title: Meta's latest move in the AI talent war — plus Cramer's 4 quick hits on the market
items.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

items.title: Retail and Wall Street are underwater on SpaceX — but not going down without a fight
items.description: Good times for SpaceX are proving short-lived as Elon Musk’s intergalactic IPO is now giving fodder to bears.

items.title: Democratic socialists top MAGA candidates among voters in CNBC's All-America poll
items.description: The survey's findings come as democratic socialist candidates win Democratic primaries following the 2025 election of New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani.

items.title: World’s largest olive oil company says market has 'definitively' entered new phase
items.description: The update comes as analysts raise concerns about the prospect of global olive oil supplies swinging dramatically from one season to the next.

items.title: California's billionaire tax: What's at risk for the biggest state economy in America
items.description: California's billionaire tax would generate quick revenue, but Norway's example shows the longer-term economic impact of targeting the wealthy is unclear.
